sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21220" key="bu/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βύνητος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, an Egyptian <sense id="n21220.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">garment</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0221.tlg001:1:219" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.219</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
